subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God and the God of all created beings, my Purpose and the Purpose of all contingent things! Thou knowest and beholdest Thy loved ones amidst [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی و اله الکائنات و مقصودی و مقصود الممکنات تعلم و تری احبائک بین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for forgiveness
